ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job type of the customer */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the customer */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the customer */,
  "metro_city" INTEGER /* Whether the customer lives in a metro city */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential or billing address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_job_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_type_id") REFERENCES job_types ("job_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent on the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the purchase record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the purchase record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_details" (
  "purchase_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase detail */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase this detail belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_details_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., customer demographics, purchase behavior) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
